name: Citigroup
overview_text: Citigroup is a global bank that provides a wide range of financial services to consumers, corporations, governments and institutions. It offers a variety of products and services, including consumer and corporate banking, investment banking, and securities trading.

description: Citigroup is a global bank that provides a wide range of financial services to consumers, corporations, governments and institutions. It offers a variety of products and services, including consumer and corporate banking, investment banking, and securities trading.
vision_statement: Empowering clients, Citi is a leading global bank, serving over 200 million customers across 160 countries.
mission_statement: To serve as a trusted partner to our clients by responsibly providing financial services that enable them to achieve their aspirations.
sales_motion: Citi offers a wide range of financial services, including consumer banking, corporate and investment banking, markets and securities, and private banking.
customer_acquisition_cost: Varies by product and channel, but estimated to be around $100-$500 per customer
customer_concentration_risk: High, with a concentration of customers in developed markets
exit_strategy_history: Citi has a history of divesting non-core businesses, including its Mexican and Korean banking operations
carbon_footprint: Estimated to be around 1.3 million metric tons CO2e per year
ethical_sourcing: Citi has a commitment to responsible sourcing, including a supplier code of conduct and a human rights policy
benchmark_vs_peers: Citi's financial performance is generally in line with its peers, with a return on equity of around 10-12%
case_studies: Citi's mobile banking app has been successful in increasing customer engagement and reducing costs
company_maturity: Established, with a history dating back to 1812
client_quality: High, with a focus on serving institutional clients
sustainability_csr: Citi has a comprehensive sustainability and CSR strategy, including targets for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and increasing diversity and inclusion
crisis_behavior: Citi has a history of responding to crises, including the 2008 financial crisis, with a focus on maintaining customer confidence and stability
